EmailTemplate.name: Forecast Fail Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: Failed to generate forecast {FORECAST_ID_TOKEN}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
An attempt by LeaseWorks to generate forecast has failed (error = {ERROR_MESSAGE_TOKEN}). Please find attached a detailed log of the results(ResultsLog.csv).
Please contact LeaseWorks at support@lease-works.com to address this exception.
Sincerely, LeaseWorks Support
